title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shadowfax

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
